central_schemes.description: Provides direct income support of ₹6000 per year to eligible farmer families through Direct Benefit Transfer.
central_schemes.eligibility: Small and marginal farmers across India

central_schemes.description: Crop insurance scheme protecting farmers against crop loss due to natural disasters, pests and diseases.
Scheme aimed at improving irrigation facilities and promoting efficient water usage in agriculture.
central_schemes.eligibility: Farmers with agricultural land needing irrigation support

maharashtra_schemes.description: Provides subsidy for electric or solar pumps to support irrigation for farmers.
maharashtra_schemes.eligibility: Farmers with agricultural land in Maharashtra

maharashtra_schemes.scheme_name: Mahatma Jyotirao Phule Shetkari Karj Mukti Yojana
maharashtra_schemes.description: Loan waiver scheme providing financial relief to farmers with outstanding crop loans.
maharashtra_schemes.eligibility: Farmers with crop loans in Maharashtra

maharashtra_schemes.description: Financial assistance scheme supporting farmers affected by floods, droughts, or other natural disasters.
maharashtra_schemes.eligibility: Farmers suffering crop loss in Maharashtra

bihar_schemes.description: Provides compensation to farmers for crop loss due to natural disasters.
bihar_schemes.eligibility: Farmers registered in Bihar facing crop loss

bihar_schemes.description: Provides subsidies for seeds, fertilizers, and agricultural inputs.
bihar_schemes.eligibility: Farmers affected by floods or droughts in Bihar

bihar_schemes.description: Provides diesel subsidy to farmers for irrigation during drought conditions.
bihar_schemes.eligibility: Farmers requiring irrigation support in Bihar
